name: Crimson Tide plc
summary: Crimson Tide plc provides mobility solutions and related software development services primarily in the United Kingdom and Ireland. It provides mpro5, a mobile business solution that provides hardware, software, Windows Azure cloud infrastructure, and installation and support, as well as job scheduling, alerting, and reporting services. The company offers mpro5 for iOS, Android, Windows Phone 8, and Blackberry 10. It is also involved in reselling third party software, and related development and support services. The company is based in Tunbridge Wells, the United Kingdom.
